typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Backfill cursor logic is not wired into production execution paths; usages of nextBackfillWindow/advanceCursor appear limited to tests, so runtime 7-day progression/live coexistence behavior is not implemented.
Provided handoff commitId is unrelated to feature scope (switcher dashboard test target change), breaking traceability/auditability for claimed implementation.
Cost-only reconciliation guard uses missingCost > 0 without epsilon, allowing floating-point residue to produce phantom micro-corrections and threaten idempotent convergence.
Provider summary provenance uses dominant-row confidence while totals aggregate mixed rows, which can label mixed exact+estimated aggregates as fully exact and violate provenance semantics.
BackfillCursorStore monotonicity allows up to 1ms backward movement (>= -epsilon), which violates strict monotonic progression despite equal-timestamp idempotency requirements.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit verification evidence for mandatory startup context reads before allowing followedProcedure=true in skill feedback, and add a checklist item that reviewers can validate directly from handoff.commandsRun.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All five m4 review reports flagged missing evidence for required context reads while handoffs still claimed followedProcedure=true; this is a repeated cross-feature pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add milestone-specific startup guidance to treat mission-scoped docs as authoritative when shared library docs are stale/misaligned, and require workers to note such drift in handoffs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple m4 reviews observed that .factory/library/architecture.md and user-testing/environment notes describe switcher-era context and can mislead token-accounting workers.

rejectedObservations.observation: Single-review note about TDD ordering in one worker transcript.
